title: 5 Food Swaps for More Energy

segments.text: Swapping just one food can boost your energy levels.
And many people don’t realize the impact of these choices.
Try oatmeal instead of sugary cereals.
Switch white bread for whole grain options.
Choose nuts over chips for a healthy snack.
These simple swaps can make a big difference.
Follow for daily tips your body will thank you for.

description: Fuel your body with smart food choices for energy. Follow for daily health tips! 🥙
